tagline: The Zoom Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Zoom Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest user sign in/sign out activity logs and admin operation logs from Zoom into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Zoom Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest user sign in/sign out activity logs and admin operation logs from Zoom into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Zoom Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
